name: io.github.rbmuller/scherlok
title: Scherlok
description: Zero-config data-quality monitoring: profile a warehouse, detect anomalies, gate CI.

environmentVariables.name: SCHERLOK_CONNECTION
environmentVariables.description: Warehouse connection string (postgresql://, bigquery://, snowflake://, mysql://, duckdb:///path). Resolved server-side; never passed by the model.
